arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ElastiCache serverless cache.

cache_usage_limits.description: The limits on cache usage, including data storage and eCPU usage per second.

create_time.description: The time when the ElastiCache serverless cache was created.

daily_snapshot_time.description: The time of day when daily snapshots are taken.

description.description: A description of the ElastiCache serverless cache.

endpoint.description: The network endpoint information including address and port for the cache.

engine.description: The name of the cache engine used by the ElastiCache serverless cache.

full_engine_version.description: The full version of the cache engine.

kms_key_id.description: The identifier of the AWS KMS key used to encrypt the data.

major_engine_version.description: The major version of the cache engine.

reader_endpoint.description: The network endpoint information for read-only access.

security_group_ids.description: The security group IDs associated with the ElastiCache serverless cache.

snapshot_retention_limit.description: The number of days to retain snapshots.

status.description: The current status of the ElastiCache serverless cache.

subnet_ids.description: The subnet IDs associated with the ElastiCache serverless cache.

user_group_id.description: The user group ID associated with the ElastiCache serverless cache.
